steps.title: Identify what must be presented
steps.content: The student wants to present the study AND its findings—meaning both the 2021 research and what it discovered about the map's age.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choice
steps.content: Choice B states both the 2021 study's discovery (titanium compound not used in inks until 1920s) and its conclusion (the map was drawn in the twentieth century). A mentions only that a study was conducted without revealing what was found; C dwells on the old theory rather than presenting the new findings; D identifies the titanium compound but never states the researchers' conclusion about the map's dating. That matches choice B — B is correct.
